garages.name: Sunset Station — Open-Air Parking
garages.notes:
Open-air surface parking at Sunset Station. The covered garage portion is verified separately at 8'2" (see Vegas-data entry osm-w544697544 for the garage; same property but tracked in Vegas because the OSM way ID lives there).
Verified in person by site operator.

garages.name: M Resort Spa Casino
garages.notes: Extreme south LV Blvd. Henderson-adjacent.

garages.name: Galleria at Sunset Mall
garages.notes:
Enclosed mall on Sunset Rd. Parking is open-air surface lots only — no covered garage on-site. Oversized-friendly by nature.
Verified in person by site operator.

garages.name: The District at Green Valley Ranch
garages.notes:
Mediterranean-village-style shopping/dining adjacent to GVR Resort. Open-air surface lots + on-street angled parking; the small underground garage on-site is residents-only (not for shoppers). Oversized-friendly by nature.
Verified in person by site operator.

garages.name: Water Street District (Downtown Henderson)
garages.notes: Historic downtown + events.
